title: helichrysum angustifrondeum
intro: Helichrysum angustifolium, also known as the narrow-leaved helichrysum, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, Asteraceae. It is native to Western Australia and is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds and skin conditions. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antimicrobial activities. Helichrysum angustifolium can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used topically or internally to promote overall health and wellness.
